items.title: Improving Recommendation Systems & Search in the Age of LLMs
items.summary: 系统综述LLM时代工业界推荐/搜索系统的演进：Semantic IDs、多模态增强架构、Scaling Laws、蒸馏LoRA、统一搜索推荐架构

items.title: Optimizing Recommendation Systems with JDK's Vector API
items.summary: Netflix分享用JDK Vector API优化推荐系统向量计算：从嵌套循环到矩阵乘法批处理，Flat Buffers + ThreadLocal提升推理吞吐
